description: Escape to the vibrant city of San Francisco, where the iconic Golden Gate Bridge meets the rich tapestry of culture and history. This 7-day adventure is designed for couples who are passionate about exploring the local scene, indulging in unique activities, and immersing themselves in the heart of NBA fandom. From the bustling streets of Chinatown to the serene beauty of Golden Gate Park, each day promises a blend of excitement and relaxation, with plenty of opportunities to shop for your favorite team merchandise and enjoy the local culinary delights.

activities.activity: Breakfast at Mama's on Washington Square
activities.description: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Mama's, known for its fresh ingredients and homemade dishes. Try their famous French toast or crab omelet for a true San Francisco experience.
Explore the bustling Fisherman's Wharf, where you can enjoy street performances, visit the sea lions at Pier 39, and indulge in some clam chowder served in a sourdough bread bowl.
Enjoy a casual lunch at Boudin Bakery, famous for its sourdough bread. Don't miss the chance to watch the bakers at work through the glass windows.
Stroll through Pier 39, where you can shop for NBA merchandise at the official team store, enjoy street performers, and take in the views of the Bay.

activities.activity: Visit the San Francisco Museum of Modern Art (SFMOMA)
activities.description: Immerse yourself in contemporary art at SFMOMA, one of the largest modern art museums in the country. The museum features works by renowned artists and often hosts special exhibitions.
activities.searchQuery: San Francisco Museum of Modern Art

activities.description: Savor a unique dining experience at The Stinking Rose, a garlic-themed restaurant. Their signature dishes are infused with garlic, making for a flavorful meal.
End your day with a romantic stroll along the Embarcadero, enjoying the views of the Bay Bridge illuminated at night. It's a perfect way to unwind after a busy day.

activities.activity: Breakfast at Mama's on Washington Square
activities.description: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Mama's, known for its fresh ingredients and homemade dishes. Try their famous French toast or crab omelet for a true San Francisco treat!

Head over to the Chase Center, home of the Golden State Warriors. Take a guided tour to learn about the team's history and see the impressive arena up close. Don't forget to check out the Warriors' championship banners!
Explore the vibrant Mission District and grab lunch at one of the local taquerias. Try the famous Mission-style burrito at La Taqueria or El Farolito for a filling and flavorful meal.
After lunch, take a stroll through the Mission District to admire the stunning street art and murals that tell the story of the neighborhood's culture and history. Don't miss the iconic Balmy Alley!
Visit the Warriors Team Store at Chase Center or check out local sports shops in the area for exclusive NBA merchandise and fan gear. It's the perfect opportunity to grab some souvenirs!

Enjoy a unique dining experience at The Stinking Rose, a garlic-themed restaurant. Indulge in their famous garlic dishes, including garlic-infused pasta and roasted garlic bulbs, for a flavorful end to your day.
End your day with a leisurely walk along the Embarcadero. Enjoy the stunning views of the Bay Bridge illuminated at night and soak in the vibrant atmosphere of the waterfront.

activities.activity: Breakfast at Mama's on Washington Square
activities.description: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Mama's, known for its fresh ingredients and homemade dishes. Try their famous French toast or crab omelet for a true San Francisco treat!

Explore the Chase Center, home of the Golden State Warriors. Take a guided tour to learn about the team's history and see the impressive arena up close. Don't forget to check out the Warriors' merchandise store for some fan gear!
Enjoy a casual lunch at The Creamery, where you can savor classic American comfort food. Their burgers and milkshakes are a must-try!
Stroll through San Francisco's vibrant Chinatown, the oldest in North America. Visit local shops for unique souvenirs and fan merchandise, and don't miss the iconic Dragon Gate!
Take a leisurely walk in Golden Gate Park, where you can enjoy beautiful gardens and scenic views. Stop by the Japanese Tea Garden for a peaceful experience and some great photo opportunities.

activities.activity: Dinner at House of Prime Rib
activities.description: Indulge in a hearty dinner at House of Prime Rib, famous for its classic prime rib served with all the traditional sides. Make sure to reserve a table in advance!

activities.activity: Attend an NBA Game at Chase Center
activities.description: End your day with an exhilarating NBA game at the Chase Center. Experience the excitement of live basketball and cheer for the Golden State Warriors!

activities.activity: Breakfast at Mama's on Washington Square
activities.description: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Mama's, known for its fresh ingredients and homemade dishes. Try their famous French toast or crab omelet for a true San Francisco treat!

Explore the vast expanse of Golden Gate Park, where you can stroll through beautiful gardens, visit the de Young Museum, or relax by Stow Lake. Don't miss the Japanese Tea Garden for a serene experience.
Enjoy a casual lunch at Park Chalet, located right at the edge of the park. Their menu features fresh seafood and local ingredients, with a lovely view of the ocean.

Take a leisurely walk along Ocean Beach, where you can enjoy the sound of the waves and the stunning views of the Pacific Ocean. It's a perfect spot for a romantic stroll or to simply relax on the sand.

activities.activity: Visit the California Academy of Sciences
activities.description: Head to the California Academy of Sciences, where you can explore an aquarium, planetarium, and natural history museum all under one roof. It's an engaging experience for both of you!
Indulge in a unique dining experience at The Stinking Rose, famous for its garlic-infused dishes. Try their garlic roasted prime rib or garlic ice cream for a fun twist!

activities.activity: NBA Merchandise Shopping at the Chase Center
activities.description: End your day with a visit to the Chase Center, home of the Golden State Warriors. Check out the team store for exclusive NBA merchandise and souvenirs to take home!

activities.activity: Breakfast at Mama's on Washington Square
activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at Mama's, famous for its delicious French toast and crab omelets. The cozy atmosphere and friendly service make it a perfect spot to fuel up for a day of exploration.

Head to the Chase Center, home of the Golden State Warriors. Take a guided tour to learn about the team's history and see the impressive arena. If you're lucky, you might catch a glimpse of a practice session!
Enjoy a casual lunch at The Bird, known for its mouthwatering fried chicken sandwiches. It's a local favorite and a great place to relax before continuing your day.
Spend the afternoon shopping in Union Square, where you can find a variety of stores, including those selling NBA merchandise. Don't forget to check out the local boutiques for unique finds!
Stroll through the iconic Haight-Ashbury district, known for its vibrant history and eclectic shops. Look for vintage stores and local art galleries, and soak in the bohemian atmosphere.
Indulge in a unique dining experience at The Stinking Rose, a garlic-themed restaurant. Try their famous garlic dishes and enjoy the quirky decor that celebrates this flavorful ingredient.
End your day with a leisurely walk at Pier 39. Enjoy the lively atmosphere, watch the sea lions, and take in the stunning views of the Bay. It's a perfect way to unwind after a busy day.

activities.activity: Breakfast at Mama's on Washington Square
activities.description: Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Mama's, known for its fresh ingredients and homemade dishes. Try their famous French toast or crab omelet for a true San Francisco treat!
Take a short drive to Muir Woods, where you can stroll among towering redwoods and enjoy the serene beauty of nature. The trails are well-marked, making it easy to explore this stunning forest.
Enjoy a cozy lunch at The Pelican Inn, a charming British-style pub near Muir Woods. Their fish and chips are a must-try, and the atmosphere is perfect for a relaxing meal after your hike.
After lunch, head to Sausalito, a picturesque waterfront town. Stroll along the marina, browse local shops, and take in the stunning views of the San Francisco skyline across the bay.
Sausalito is home to many art galleries showcasing local artists. Spend some time exploring these galleries and perhaps find a unique piece to take home as a souvenir.
Head back to San Francisco and enjoy the scenic views along the way. You might catch a glimpse of the Golden Gate Bridge from the car!
End your day with dinner at The Cheesecake Factory located at Union Square. With an extensive menu and a stunning view of the city, it's a great spot to relax and enjoy a meal together.
If there's a game or event, head to the Chase Center, home of the Golden State Warriors. Experience the excitement of an NBA game and grab some fan merchandise to commemorate your visit!

transit.memo: Direct flight back to Washington D.C.

activities.activity: Breakfast at Mama's on Washington Square
activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at this beloved local spot known for its delicious French toast and crab omelets. It's a perfect way to fuel up before your travels!

Explore the Chase Center, home of the Golden State Warriors. You can take a guided tour to learn about the team's history and see behind-the-scenes areas. Don't forget to check out the Warriors' merchandise store for some fan gear!

activities.activity: Shopping for NBA Merchandise at the Warriors Team Store
activities.description: After the tour, head to the Warriors Team Store located at the Chase Center to pick up some exclusive NBA merchandise and souvenirs to remember your trip!
Enjoy a casual lunch at The Bird, famous for its fried chicken sandwiches. It's a great spot to relax and refuel before your flight.

activities.activity: Head to San Francisco International Airport
activities.description: Make your way to the airport for your flight back to Washington D.C. Ensure you arrive at least two hours before your departure time.
